authorization_summary: Operator authorized completion of steps 1-8 with full authority for a clean canonical CallScore system fully operational with no TODOs/stubs and unified autonomous agentic system.
scope_allowed: approved production operationalization where rollback is documented
validation of CallScore, Workplane, agentic roster, public app, and governed lanes
